title: Shoulder restraints
wikitext:
[]: Shoulder restraints...             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 01, 2005 12:06 am When they show Adam in Antarctica, it just sunk in for me that he had those rectangular shoulder "restraints". (Or what looked to be them). Do you think they were put on him as part of shrinking him down to embryo form, or were they just part of his body. (And thus, the Eva's shoulder restraints were modeled after said body parts to make them look more like Adam?) But since all the Evas except for Unit-01 are clones of Adam, wouldn't their bodies just have that "part" naturally? Bwaaaa! I'm over thinking this...

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Jul 01, 2005 12:58 am Unit-01 is still a clone of Adam, but is a clone of Adam which was given birth to by Lileth. There is ample evidence to back this up, in the anime. The way things are worded by SEELE are what gives rise to the confusion. As to the shoulder pylons, I'm certain that they aren't a natural part of Adam. We know from Ritsuko's words that they are restraints of some kind, so we can safely assume, in my opinion, that the Katsuragi team were attempting to gain control of Adam by the use of them. It is also worth pointing out at this time that there is incontrovertible evidence in the anime that points to Adam being female. The name is something that was given to her by humans, who do not neccessarily understand her true nature. Kaworu, on the other hand, could be expected to speak with greater authority, and he refers to Adam as "Mother".

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 1:06 am Wow Soluzar you know a lot about this show. Impressive. I would have never known Adam was female and all that stuff about Eva 01. But it makes sence that they tried to control Adam because Adam was supposedly looked the same as the Evas. so they could probably control him the same way as an Eva. here's another interesting point. do you think they were going to try and put and entry plug into Adam??

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Jul 01, 2005 2:30 am rob_of_the_genesis wrote: Wow Soluzar you know a lot about this show. Impressive. I would have never known Adam was female and all that stuff about Eva 01. But it makes sence that they tried to control Adam because Adam was supposedly looked the same as the Evas. so they could probably control him the same way as an Eva. here's another interesting point. do you think they were going to try and put and entry plug into Adam??

[]:             Quote Post by Oroboro » Fri Jul 01, 2005 6:38 am If Adam was female...and Lilth was female...that could only mean one thing...GIANT MONSTER LESBIANS!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 01, 2005 9:05 am rob_of_the_genesis wrote: so they could probably control him the same way as an Eva. here's another interesting point. do you think they were going to try and put and entry plug into Adam??

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Jul 01, 2005 9:34 am Oroboro wrote: If Adam was female...and Lilth was female...that could only mean one thing...GIANT MONSTER LESBIANS!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jul 01, 2005 10:08 am Mr. Bud wrote: I find that unlikely. After all, wasn't it the main purpose of that expedition to shrink Adam down to minimize it's "life force" so it would be harder for the Angels to find him or something? And when the Katsuragi expedition was going on, I'm pretty sure entry plugs weren't even invented.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 11:47 am Oroboro wrote: If Adam was female...and Lilth was female...that could only mean one thing...GIANT MONSTER LESBIANS!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Jul 01, 2005 4:45 pm i say that they simply placed the pylons on adam (i guess it would be a "she") to restrain her so that they could conduct research. it would make sense for them to try to restrain the potential actions of adam while trying to do what they eventually did to shrink him. and i am pretty sure that the anti-AT field was simply there for the purposes of trying to contain him, the team was wiped out, it seems, by the massive explosions that followed.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sat Jul 02, 2005 4:22 am At the beginning of episode 21' one of the scientists says that Adam's Anti AT field is expanding I think. and also in death when Adam spreads his wings, you can see people's soul's floating around. so maybe she does have an AT field.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 02, 2005 3:37 pm wait... there were souls floating around? i must have missed something huge... and the scientists were the ones making the anti-AT field (it seems to be so from the snippets of dialogue that we hear, but perhaps i am mistaken)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sat Jul 02, 2005 3:54 pm rob_of_the_genesis wrote: and also in death when Adam spreads his wings, you can see people's soul's floating around.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sat Jul 02, 2005 4:19 pm yes, all those little red dots are floating around Adam's wings when they spread. those are souls, just like the red dot souls in End of Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:08 am OK so what is it the shoulder bindings actually DO? Time to look into this. One thing always puzzled me. How did Katsuragi survive long enough to save Misato? What exactly caused Adam to go kaboom? Presumably it was the artifically induced Anti-AT Field. But then, why didn't Adam explode sooner, and how did Katsuragi have enough time to get Misato to safety? The answers to these questions, might lie in the nature of the shoulder pylons. Remember when the scientist are babbling about getting an Anti-AT field set up around Adam. Scientist : Even if only for a half a second, we have to put an anti-AT Field around him! Get enough energy to generate an anti-AT Field! Scientist : The conversion system is already set! Scientist : Countdown has been activated!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:12 am Interesting. Perhaps they were there to delay the spreading of Adam's wings? Them being on the shoulder and back area and all.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:34 am Soluzar wrote: Kaworu, on the other hand, could be expected to speak with greater authority, and he refers to Adam as "Mother".

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 03, 2005 11:14 am RuaDragon wrote: Soluzar wrote: Kaworu, on the other hand, could be expected to speak with greater authority, and he refers to Adam as "Mother".

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 3:43 pm wow very good analysis ObsessiveMathsFreak, especially with all the pictures! Yeah I think I agree with you. The shoulder restraints were put there to slow Adamn down. So they could get the hell out of the way before He exploded down into his embryo form, then they could just go back and get it after it was all said and done. but nobody got out of the way in time, and Dr. Katsuragi took heavy damage, and it looked like he was going to bleed to death or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Oblivious » Mon Jul 04, 2005 1:21 am I would like to quietly interject that that the 'Adam' of our world was androgynous, according to the Kaballah. This would be relevant since it is obvious that it has an influence on Evangelion, and it's 'Path to God' business. http://www.theosophical.org/theosophy/books/hiddenwisdom2/ch4.html Adam was first â€œformedâ€ as a spiritual unity, not physically incarnated (see Gen. 2:7â€”formed is iitzer in Heb.; â€œ[God] gave permanent and homogeneous form to Adam as an individual spiritual entityâ€). Genesis now proceeds to describe the creation and the evolution of humanity, the second chapter being partly concerned with the change produced in the physical body by evolutionary processes. The first human form, typified by Adam, was androgynous. Gradually, however, as the cycle progressed in which the human form was developed and the masculine-feminine spiritual Soul entered into closer association with that form, a change began to occur. Out of the androgynous organism the single-sexed, separate man and woman of today developed. Adam (â€œmanâ€) alone in the Garden of Eden personifies the first sexually innocent humanity, while Adam and Eve together typify the first separated men and women. The production of Eve from the side and out of a rib of Adam while he slept is an allegorical description of this process.
